recipe.title: Slow-cooker beef
recipe.description: Celebrate your slow cooker with this beautifully tender beef recipe – it's a proper winter warmer!

steps.descr: Remove the beef from the fridge 30 minutes before you...
steps.instructions: Remove the beef from the fridge 30 minutes before you want to cook it, to let it come up to room temperature.

on_enter.say: Remove the beef from the fridge 30 minutes before you want to cook it, to let it come up to room temperature.

steps.descr: Peel the onions, wash and roughly chop the carrots and...
steps.instructions: Peel the onions, wash and roughly chop the carrots and celery – there’s no need to peel them. Halve the garlic bulb across the middle.

on_enter.say: Peel the onions, wash and roughly chop the carrots and celery – there’s no need to peel them. Halve the garlic bulb across the middle.

steps.descr: Pile all the veg, garlic and herbs into the slow cooker*
steps.instructions: Pile all the veg, garlic and herbs into the slow cooker*.

on_enter.say: Pile all the veg, garlic and herbs into the slow cooker*.

steps.descr: Pour in the passata, beef stock and stir in the sugar
steps.instructions: Pour in the passata, beef stock and stir in the sugar.

on_enter.say: Pour in the passata, beef stock and stir in the sugar.

steps.descr: Drizzle the beef with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, rub all...
steps.instructions: Drizzle the beef with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, rub all over with the paprika and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then sit it on top of the veg.

on_enter.say: Drizzle the beef with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, rub all over with the paprika and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then sit it on top of the veg.

steps.descr: Cook on the lowest setting for 8 hours, until...
steps.instructions: Cook on the lowest setting for 8 hours, until beautifully tender, then remove the beef to a plate, cover with tin foil and leave to rest while you make the sauce.

on_enter.say: Cook on the lowest setting for 8 hours, until beautifully tender, then remove the beef to a plate, cover with tin foil and leave to rest while you make the sauce.

steps.descr: Strain the tomato sauce through a sieve over a clean pan...
steps.instructions: Strain the tomato sauce through a sieve over a clean pan to catch the liquid, gently pressing to help it along, then season to taste with salt, pepper and a little more sugar, if needed.

on_enter.say: Strain the tomato sauce through a sieve over a clean pan to catch the liquid, gently pressing to help it along, then season to taste with salt, pepper and a little more sugar, if needed.

steps.descr: Shred the meat back into the slow-cooker pot and pour...
steps.instructions: Shred the meat back into the slow-cooker pot and pour over the sauce, then leave on a low setting to keep warm until you’re ready to eat, or enjoy straightaway with creamy mash and steamed seasonal greens.

on_enter.say: Shred the meat back into the slow-cooker pot and pour over the sauce, then leave on a low setting to keep warm until you’re ready to eat, or enjoy straightaway with creamy mash and steamed seasonal greens.
